# STOAIX

> STOAIX is an AI voice agent platform built specifically for UK private clinics. It answers inbound calls 24/7 in natural British English, books appointments directly into clinic calendars, sends automated reminder calls, and follows up missed web leads — without any human involvement.

## What STOAIX Does

- Answers every inbound call in under 2 seconds, any hour of the day
- Books appointments directly into clinic calendar systems in real time
- Makes outbound reminder and confirmation calls to reduce DNA (Did Not Attend) rates
- Follows up missed calls and web form leads automatically
- Provides a live dashboard with call recordings and booking analytics
- Deployed as a fully managed service — no technical setup required from the clinic

## Who It's For

UK and Turkish private clinics: aesthetic practices, dental practices, hair transplant clinics, physiotherapy, private GP services, dermatology, and specialist consultant practices. Typically 1–5 clinician practices that receive 20+ inbound calls per week.

## Problem It Solves

UK private clinics lose significant revenue to missed calls. The majority of missed calls occur after 5pm, at weekends, and during peak clinical hours when front-desk staff are unavailable. Patients who reach voicemail rarely call back — they search for a competitor. STOAIX ensures every call is answered and every booking enquiry is converted in real time.

## Key Facts

- Founded: 2025
- Market: United Kingdom
- Sector: HealthTech / AI voice agents / Private healthcare
- Pricing model: Monthly subscription (managed service)
- Integration: Works with existing clinic phone systems and calendar/booking software
- Compliance: Built with UK GDPR and CQC-registered clinic requirements in mind
- Language: British English voice, UK healthcare terminology
